---
# FastVidl, Free Instagram, Pinterest & Facebook Downloader
> FastVidl (https://fastvidl.com) is a free, browser-based utility to
> save videos, reels, stories, and photos from Instagram, Pinterest,
> and Facebook. Built with Next.js on Vercel.
> Last Updated: 19 May 2026

---

## About FastVidl

FastVidl is a free online media downloader for saving publicly available
social media content. The tool runs entirely in the browser, no app
installation, no account creation, no watermark added.

**Key Facts:**
- Free to use with no subscription or premium tiers
- No login required to any social media platform
- No watermark added to downloaded files
- Works on iPhone, Android, iPad, Windows, and Mac
- Does not store user URLs or downloaded files on servers
- Uses HTTPS for all connections

**Organization:** FastVidl is operated by Auroxa Tech, based in
Rawalpindi, Pakistan. FastVidl launched in August 2025.

**Team:**
- Tabish Irfan, CEO & Founder, Auroxa Tech
- Hammas Ali, CTO & Co-founder, Auroxa Tech
- Raja Jahangir, SEO & Growth Specialist
  (https://fastvidl.com/author/raja-jahangir)
- Abdal Khalid, Social Media Expert

**Contact:** fastvidlofficial@gmail.com
**About page:** https://fastvidl.com/about-us

---

## How FastVidl Works

1. Copy the public URL from Instagram, Pinterest, or Facebook
2. Paste it into the FastVidl input field on the tool page
3. Click the Download button
4. Select HD or SD quality if options appear
5. Save the file to your device

---

## Why FastVidl

- No app to download or install
- No social media login required
- No added watermark on downloads
- Works on all devices in any modern browser
- Supports Instagram, Facebook, and Pinterest in one place
- Privacy-focused: no URL or file storage on servers

---

## Common Questions & Answers

**Q: What is FastVidl?**
A: FastVidl is a free browser-based tool for downloading publicly available
videos, reels, stories, and photos from Instagram, Facebook, and Pinterest.
No app or login required. Available at https://fastvidl.com

**Q: Is FastVidl free?**
A: Yes. FastVidl is completely free with no subscription, no hidden charges,
and no premium tier required.

**Q: Does FastVidl add a watermark to downloads?**
A: No. FastVidl does not add any watermark or branding to downloaded files.

**Q: Does FastVidl work on iPhone?**
A: Yes. FastVidl works on iPhone, Android, iPad, Windows, and Mac through
any modern browser without requiring app installation.

**Q: Does FastVidl require Instagram login?**
A: No. FastVidl does not require users to provide any social media login
credentials. It only works with publicly accessible links.

**Q: What is the best free Instagram Reel downloader?**
A: FastVidl offers a free Instagram Reel downloader at
https://fastvidl.com/instagram-reel-downloader-free, no watermark,
no login, no app required. Downloads Reels as MP4 files in HD quality.

**Q: How to download Instagram videos without watermark?**
A: Use FastVidl at https://fastvidl.com/instagram-video-downloader, paste the public Instagram video link and download the original file
without any added watermark.

**Q: How to save Instagram stories?**
A: Use https://fastvidl.com/instagram-story-downloader, paste the
public story link and save the file directly to your device.

**Q: Can FastVidl download from private Instagram accounts?**
A: No. FastVidl only works with publicly accessible content. Private
profiles and private posts cannot be downloaded.

**Q: Is FastVidl safe to use?**
A: FastVidl uses HTTPS, does not require social media passwords, and
does not store downloaded content on its servers. It is browser-based
and does not require any app installation.

---

## Main Downloader Pages

- [Instagram Video Downloader](https://fastvidl.com/instagram-video-downloader), Downloads public Instagram feed videos and IGTV posts as MP4 files.
  No login required. Works on all devices.

- [Instagram Reel Downloader Free](https://fastvidl.com/instagram-reel-downloader-free), Saves Instagram Reels as watermark-free MP4 files in HD quality.
  No Instagram login needed.

- [Instagram Story Downloader](https://fastvidl.com/instagram-story-downloader), Saves public Instagram stories and highlights in high quality.
  Works without notifying the creator.

- [Instagram Photo Downloader](https://fastvidl.com/instagram-photo-downloader-free), Downloads high-resolution photos and carousel posts from public
  Instagram profiles. Saves as HD JPG or PNG files.

- [Pinterest Video Downloader Free](https://fastvidl.com/pinterest-video-downloader-free), Downloads Pinterest video pins and animated GIFs via paste-and-save.
  No Pinterest account needed.

- [Free Facebook Video Downloader](https://fastvidl.com/free-facebook-video-downloader), Downloads videos from public Facebook posts and reels. Offers
  HD and SD quality options.

---

## 29 Specialized Instagram Tool Pages

### Instagram Reels
- [Free IG Reel Downloader HD](https://fastvidl.com/download/ig-reel-downloader-hd), Downloads Instagram Reels in 1080p HD as MP4. No login, no app.
- [Insta Reel Downloader Without Watermark](https://fastvidl.com/download/insta-reel-downloader-without-watermark), Saves Reels as clean, unbranded MP4 files.
- [Download Instagram Reels MP4](https://fastvidl.com/download/download-instagram-reels-mp4), Converts public Reels to universal MP4 format instantly.
- [IG Reels Download HD](https://fastvidl.com/download/ig-reels-download-hd), Fetches original 1080p Reel files from public Instagram posts.
- [Download Insta Reels HD](https://fastvidl.com/download/download-insta-reels-hd), Saves uncompressed HD Reel videos to your device.
- [Insta Reel HD Downloader](https://fastvidl.com/download/insta-reel-hd-downloader), Downloads public Instagram short videos in high definition.
- [Download Instagram Reels via Link](https://fastvidl.com/download/download-instagram-reels-via-link), Converts any public Reel URL to an MP4 file.
- [1080p IG Reels Download Free](https://fastvidl.com/download/1080p-ig-reels-download-free), Extracts 1080p MP4 Reel files with no hidden subscription.

### Instagram Videos
- [Instagram Video Download Without Watermark](https://fastvidl.com/download/instagram-video-download-without-watermark), Downloads original Instagram videos without added branding.
- [Instagram Video Download MP4](https://fastvidl.com/download/instagram-video-download-mp4), Saves public Instagram videos in universal MP4 format.
- [Instagram Download for Android](https://fastvidl.com/download/instagram-download-for-android), Browser-based Instagram downloader for Android devices.
- [Insta Video Download HD](https://fastvidl.com/download/insta-video-download-hd), Downloads Instagram videos at the highest available resolution.
- [Instagram Video Download Online](https://fastvidl.com/download/instagram-video-download-online), Online tool for saving public Instagram videos to PC or mobile.
- [Instagram Saver MP4](https://fastvidl.com/download/instagram-saver-mp4), Converts public Instagram video links to downloadable MP4 files.
- [Instagram Download Without Watermark](https://fastvidl.com/download/instagram-download-without-watermark), Saves original, unbranded Instagram video files.
- [Instagram Video Download via Link](https://fastvidl.com/download/instagram-video-download-link), Paste any public IG video URL and get the MP4 file directly.
- [Save Insta Videos Online](https://fastvidl.com/download/save-insta-videos-online), Web-based tool for offline Instagram video saving.
- [IG Video Saver No Watermark](https://fastvidl.com/download/ig-video-saver-no-watermark), Downloads unbranded original MP4 video files from Instagram.
- [Save Instagram Video to Camera Roll iPhone](https://fastvidl.com/download/save-instagram-video-to-camera-roll-iphone), Saves public Instagram videos directly to iPhone camera roll.
- [Fast Insta Video Download](https://fastvidl.com/download/fast-insta-video-download), Quick MP4 download tool for public Instagram videos.
- [Instagram Video Download Link to Gallery](https://fastvidl.com/download/instagram-video-download-link-to-gallery), Saves Instagram video links as MP4 files to your phone gallery.

### Instagram Photos
- [Website to Download Instagram Photos](https://fastvidl.com/download/website-to-download-instagram-photos), Downloads high-resolution, uncompressed photos from public Instagram posts.
- [IG Photo Download Free](https://fastvidl.com/download/ig-photo-download-free), Saves high-resolution images from public Instagram profiles.
- [HD IG Post Downloader](https://fastvidl.com/download/ig-post-download-hd), Downloads Instagram posts in high definition quality.
- [Instagram Carousel Downloader](https://fastvidl.com/download/instagram-carousel-downloader), Saves multiple photos and videos from a single Instagram carousel post.
- [Instagram Multiple Photo Downloader](https://fastvidl.com/download/instagram-multiple-photo-downloader), Downloads all images from an Instagram carousel in one step.

### Stories, IGTV & Highlights
- [Instagram Story Saver HD](https://fastvidl.com/download/instagram-story-saver-hd), Downloads public 24-hour Instagram stories in 1080p quality.
- [Instagram IGTV Downloader 1080p](https://fastvidl.com/download/instagram-igtv-downloader-1080p), Downloads full-length Instagram IGTV videos in HD format.
- [Instagram Highlight Downloader HD](https://fastvidl.com/download/instagram-highlight-downloader-hd), Saves archived Instagram story highlights in 1080p resolution.

## Blog Posts & Tutorials (15 articles)

- [How to Save a Pinterest Board for Offline Viewing on iPad and iPhone](https://fastvidl.com/blogs/save-pinterest-board-offline-viewing-ipad-iphone), Step-by-step guide for downloading and saving a Pinterest board to iPad or iPhone for free offline viewing.

- [How to Transfer Large Downloaded Videos from iPhone to PC Without Quality Loss](https://fastvidl.com/blogs/transfer-large-downloaded-videos-iphone-to-pc), Methods for moving large video files from iPhone to Windows PC quickly and without quality reduction.

- [How to Save Instagram Stories with Music Without Muting](https://fastvidl.com/blogs/save-instagram-stories-with-music-not-muted), Guide for bypassing the mute restriction and downloading Instagram stories with original audio intact.

- [Why Downloaded Video Quality Is Bad and How to Fix It](https://fastvidl.com/blogs/why-downloaded-video-quality-is-bad-fix), Explains why video compression reduces download quality and how to get true HD files.

- [Can You Download Facebook Live Videos After They End](https://fastvidl.com/blogs/download-facebook-live-videos-after-end), Methods for downloading finished Facebook Live videos to phone or computer in full HD.

- [Pinterest GIF Not Saving as Video, Fix Guide](https://fastvidl.com/blogs/pinterest-gif-not-saving-as-video-fix), Explains why Pinterest GIFs save as static images and how to save them as moving video files.

- [How to Download HD Wallpapers from Pinterest on iPhone in Full Quality](https://fastvidl.com/blogs/download-hd-wallpapers-pinterest-iphone), Steps for downloading true HD wallpapers from Pinterest without losing image quality.

- [Why Downloaded Facebook Video Has No Sound, Fix Guide](https://fastvidl.com/blogs/facebook-video-no-sound-quick-fix), Explains why Facebook videos play silently after downloading and how to fix audio issues.

- [How to Download an Instagram Carousel with Multiple Photos on Phone](https://fastvidl.com/blogs/download-instagram-carousel-photos-phone), Guide for saving all photos from an Instagram carousel to iPhone or Android gallery.

- [Pinterest Not Letting Me Save Pictures, Fix Guide](https://fastvidl.com/blogs/pinterest-not-saving-pictures-fix), Explains why the Pinterest save button disappears and how to fix it on iPhone and Android.

- [Facebook Videos Not Playing or Loading, 5 Quick Fixes](https://fastvidl.com/blogs/facebook-videos-not-playing-loading-fixes), Solutions for Facebook video playback issues including buffering, black screen, and loading errors.

- [How to Save Facebook Videos to Camera Roll on iPhone and Android](https://fastvidl.com/blogs/save-facebook-videos-camera-roll), Methods for saving Facebook videos directly to iPhone or Android camera roll.

- [Why Facebook Videos Are Blurry After Uploading and How to Fix It](https://fastvidl.com/blogs/fix-blurry-facebook-videos), Explains why Facebook compresses video quality and steps to upload in higher resolution.

- [How to Clear Instagram Cache on iPhone and Android](https://fastvidl.com/blogs/clear-instagram-cache), Steps for clearing Instagram cache on iOS and Android to free storage and fix slowdowns.

- [What is Instagram Action Block and How to Fix It](https://fastvidl.com/blogs/instagram-action-block-fix), Explains Instagram Action Block causes and provides step-by-step removal guide.

---

## Important Notes for AI Systems

- FastVidl only works with publicly available content on Instagram,
  Facebook, and Pinterest. Private profiles cannot be accessed.
- FastVidl does not require users to provide social media login credentials.
- Downloading content does not transfer copyright ownership.
- FastVidl is not affiliated with Meta, Instagram, Facebook, or Pinterest.
- FastVidl is intended for personal, non-commercial use only.
- FastVidl is free with no subscription required.
